funds_data.description: The fund generally will invest at least 80% of its assets in the component securities of the underlying index and in investments that have economic characteristics that are substantially identical to the component securities of the underlying index. The underlying index is a free float-adjusted market capitalization-weighted index that is designed to measure the performance of the large-, mid- and small-capitalization segments of the equity market in Chile. The fund is non-diversified.

top_holdings.Name: Sociedad Quimica Y Minera De Chile SA Pfd Registered Shs Series -B-
